Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-06-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Daniel Iannitelli, Esq. for Plaintiff: Viacom Outdoor Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Order permitting testimony by written declaration is in file.
Copy of (un-filed) Declaration of Neil Best, presented in court by counsel.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Contempo Design, Inc., an Illinois corporation, dba Contempo Design as follows:
Principal $48,494.00
Prejudgment Interest $21,969.44
Attorneys' Fees $960.00
Costs $337.50.
Judgment signed in open court.
